For any set $S$ of real numbers define a new set $f(S)$ by $f(S) = \lbrace x/3
\mid x \in S \rbrace \cup \lbrace (x + 2)/3 \mid x \in S \rbrace$.

\begin{enumerate}[(a)]

\item Sketch, carefully, the set $f(f(f(I)))$, where $I$ is the interval $[0,
      1]$.
\item If $T$ is a bounded set such that $f(T) = T$, determine, {\it with
      proof}, whether $T$ can contain $1/2$.

\end{enumerate}
